examples: The scattergun approach to marketing means that the campaign is not targeted at particular individuals.
They advocated a scattergun approach of Posting dozens of letters.
Most of these have attracted almost no support because of their scattergun nature.
"My goal is not to have four or five ventures going, but dozens, " says Gorman, a stiff midwestern lawyer who applies the same scattergun approach to shooting quail in his spare time.
